name: Tropical Fruit Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup pineapple chunks in juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sour cream and orange marmalade.
2. Add the chopped peanuts and toasted coconut flakes to the mixture.
3. Stir in the pineapple chunks, strawberries, starfruit slices, banana pieces, and pear slices until well mixed.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to blend.
5. Before serving, sprinkle additional coconut flakes on top if desired.
6. Serve the fruit dip chilled alongside fresh fruit.
